## How to Use Vora AI Video Generator

With the Vora AI video generator online, you can effortlessly transform text prompts and images into stunning videos, complete with voiceovers and visual effects. Follow three easy steps to get started.

1

![step img](https://dlaudio.fineshare.net/web/vora/sora-vg-step1.webp)

### Enter Prompt

Describe the video you want to create, including details about the characters, actions, settings, movements, and any other important elements. You can also upload an image as a reference for your AI video.

2

![step img](https://dlaudio.fineshare.net/web/vora/sora-vg-step2.webp)

### Adjust Settings

Select an aspect ratio: "16:9" for landscape or "9:16" for portrait. Then, choose your video duration (10, 15, or 25 seconds) and preferred resolution (720P, 1080P, 2K, or 4K).

3

![step img](https://dlaudio.fineshare.net/web/vora/sora-vg-step3.webp)

### Generate Video

Click the "Generate" button, and the AI video generator will start crafting your video. Using the Sora 2 AI model, creation typically takes 3-5 minutes. Once finished, you can preview and download the AI video directly to your device.

5

I’ve tried several AI video tools, but Vora stands out for its ease of use and powerful features. The Sora integration allows me to generate high-quality videos quickly, and the ability to clone viral videos is incredible for keeping up with trends. Highly recommended for anyone serious about video creation!

DJ

David Johnson, The Media Guy

5

As an educator, I need tools that save time and deliver results. Vora does both! I can create engaging lessons and tutorials in minutes, and the watermark remover ensures my videos look polished and professional. It has become an essential part of my teaching toolkit.

EW

Emily Williams, Teacher

4

Vora offers a lot of great features for video creators, especially the watermark removal and video enhancement. I do wish there were more advanced editing options and templates, but overall, it’s a reliable tool that’s helped me grow my audience.

MB

Michael Brown

4

The video-to-prompt conversion is super useful for cloning viral content, and the download feature works perfectly. Sometimes the AI-generated prompts could be more creative or varied, but I still find Vora extremely helpful for quick content production.

OD

Olivia Davis

5

What I love most about Vora is how easy it is to enhance my videos. The resolution and color-balancing features make even my amateur footage look professional. The AI video cloning lets me experiment with styles I see on social media. It is a must-have for creators!

DM

Daniel Miller

Vora’s prompt library is a treasure trove for anyone struggling with creative block. I’ve used it to jumpstart new projects and the results have always exceeded my expectations. Downloading my videos without watermarks is a huge plus. I can’t recommend Vora enough.

CW

Chloe Wilson

5

This is the best AI video generator I’ve used so far. The interface is intuitive, and the video enhancement tools are top-notch. I love how I can convert any video to a prompt and recreate it in my own style. Vora has helped me produce content for my tech channel faster and with better quality than ever before.

EM

Ethan Moore, Tech Blogger

4

I appreciate how easy it is to generate and enhance videos with Vora. The ability to work without an invitation code for Sora is a big advantage. I’d love to see more integrations with platforms, but it’s still an excellent solution for marketers.

GT

Grace Taylor, Marketing Manager

Vora is a solid choice for basic video generation and editing tasks, especially for beginners. However, some advanced features feel limited, and customization options could be improved. It’s a good starting point, but professionals might need more robust tools for complex projects.

MA
